assertions.title: Frontend builds successfully with new dependencies

steps.observed: Exit code 0. 0 errors, 3 warnings. All 3 warnings are pre-existing in useGeminiLive.ts (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) — none from brainstorm code.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed. react-markdown (^10.1.0) and jszip (^3.10.1) confirmed in frontend/package.json dependencies. All 4 build/lint/test commands independently re-executed and passed: ruff check (0 issues), pytest (53 passed), npm run build (621 modules, exit 0), npm run lint (0 errors, 3 pre-existing warnings).
